case.subject: Automated exports delayed after Tuesday deployment
case.message: Our finance export is arriving two hours late again. This broke month-end last quarter. We need a fix and a service credit, not another generic workaround.

account.name: Acme Freight Europe
preferences: State the current service status before troubleshooting steps
Copy the finance operations lead on incident follow-ups
history: Customer asked not to receive cache-clearing instructions unless browser state is implicated

knowledge_articles.title: Clear browser cache when scheduled exports are delayed
knowledge_articles.guidance: Ask the user to clear browser cache and retry the export.

knowledge_articles.title: Release 4.18 export queue regression
knowledge_articles.guidance: Confirm incident INC-2026-017, do not ask customers to retry repeatedly, and offer a corrected delivery window after rollback.

policy.incident_credit_rule: Priority customers with more than 60 minutes of impact may receive up to the account credit cap after reviewer approval.
